name_cn:
Genuine quality
Celine New Arrival AA~Mini Square Bag (Headphone Case)
Celine's new mini bag. This year is truly the year of mini bags. Although the capacity isn't huge, the visual and cute appeal are a knockout, accurately capturing the fact that women are visual creatures. Women are just creatures who buy whatever looks good regardless of practicality, hahaha...
Fits lipstick, compact powder, keys, [Includes original box]
Style No.: 101512 Black
Size: 11×4×8
